general.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the application.

appearance.fontDescription: Choose the font used throughout the application.

sound.outputDeviceDescription: Select the audio output device for playback.

diagnostics.exportDescription: Export diagnostics report for bug reports or troubleshooting.

confirm.deletePlaylistMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?
confirm.deleteFolderMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this folder?
confirm.deleteFolderWarning: This folder contains playlists that will also be deleted.
confirm.deleteTagMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all tracks.
confirm.deleteCategoryMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this category? All tags in this category will be removed from all tracks.
confirm.removeFromPlaylistMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this track from the playlist?} other {Remove {count} tracks from the playlist?}}
confirm.removeFromLibraryMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Remove this track from your library?} other {Remove {count} tracks from your library?}}
confirm.removeFromLibraryWarning: This action cannot be undone. Tracks will be removed from all playlists.
confirm.deleteTracksFromCollection: Also delete tracks from my collection

relocate.title: Relocate Track
relocate.message: Select the new location for this track.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Track Detected
duplicate.message: This file matches an existing track in your library:
duplicate.skipDescription: Don't import this file. Keep the existing track unchanged.
duplicate.updatePathDescription: Keep all existing data (cue points, tags, playlists, play history) but update the file location.
duplicate.replaceDescription: Fresh import from new file. Keeps playlist memberships only. Resets cue points, tags, and play history.

conflict.title: Name Conflict
conflict.message: A {type} named "{name}" already exists in this location.
conflict.mergeFolder: Move contents of this folder into the existing folder. You'll be prompted for any nested conflicts.
conflict.mergePlaylist: Combine tracks from both playlists into one.
conflict.mergeNotAvailable: Not available: both items must be the same type to merge.
conflict.replaceDescription: Delete the existing {type} and move this {item} in its place.
conflict.replaceNotAvailable: Not available: can only replace items of the same type.
conflict.replaceFolderWarning: Replacing will permanently delete the existing folder and all its contents.
conflict.replacePlaylistWarning: Replacing will permanently delete the existing playlist and its track associations.

toast.trackAdded: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} added to {playlistName}
toast.trackAddedWithFailed: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} added to {playlistName}, {failed} failed
toast.tracksImportedWithSkipped: {imported, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{imported} tracks}} imported, {skipped} skipped
toast.trackRemoved: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} removed from playlist
toast.trackRemovedFromLibrary: {count, plural, =1 {1 track} other {{count} tracks}} removed from library
toast.failedToAddPlaylist: Failed to add tracks to playlist
toast.warningTracksImportedFailed: Tracks imported but failed to add to {playlistName}
toast.noArtworkInFile: No artwork found in audio file

errors.cannotDropIntoSelf: Cannot drop a folder into itself
errors.cannotDropIntoSubfolder: Cannot drop a folder into its own subfolder

crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.description: The application encountered an unexpected error.
